name: impact-preview skips files under directories listed in .gitignore at the root per F-6 working-tree walk policy
command:
mkdir -p tree/node_modules tree/src && printf 'eval(0)
' > tree/node_modules/x.js && printf 'clean
' > tree/src/y.js && printf 'node_modules
' > tree/.gitignore && printf '%s' '{"rules":[{"id":"r","detector":"grep -n eval || true"}]}' > r.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/impact-preview.sh" --rule-file r.json --root tree --format json 2>out.txt && grep -q '"violation_count":0' out.txt && echo excluded 1>&2
